parameters.query:
SELECT doc_type, doc_number, doc_year, pasal_number, chunk_text, source_url, doc_title, 1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) as similarity
FROM tax_documents
WHERE status_hukum = 'BERLAKU'
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR jenis_pajak = $2)
  AND ($3::text IS NULL OR doc_type = $3)
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 20;
